title: Indecta Era
content:

The '''Indecta Era''' was the period of time from [[17,018 BBY]] to [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]. The period was noted for the introduction of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] used by the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]].

==Timeline of the Indecta era==
*[[17,018 BBY]]
**The [[Indecta Era]] begins.<ref name="Warfare" />
**The [[First Alsakan Conflict]] begins, sparking fourteen hundred years of conflict between Alsakan and Coruscant. Alsakan leads its supporters, the Axis worlds, in blocking the [[Grand Companies]] of the Spin from expanding south, and the trading conglomerates are backed by Duros merchant barons and the Coruscant-dominated Republic.<ref name="Warfare" />
**Republic forces conquer the planet [[Virujansi/Legends|Virujansi]].<ref name="Warfare" />
*[[17,012 BBY]]
**Alsakani forces [[Alsakani liberation of Virujansi|liberate]] Virujansi.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[17,000 BBY]]
**Rogue [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] scientists transplant a number of [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] to the [[Quermia system/Legends|Quermia system]], where they terraform the planet [[Quermia/Legends|Quermia]] into a paradise and genetically manipulate the Xexto, resulting in the evolution of the [[Quermian/Legends|Quermian]] species.<ref name="Power of the Jedi">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
*[[16,921 BBY]]
**The [[Battle of Kes]], the only direct armed conflict between the Republic and Alsakan during the early Alsakan Conflicts, occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*[[16,820 BBY]]
**The [[First Siege of Porus Vida]] occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*[[16,782 BBY]]
**The [[Celebratus Archive]] is founded on the planet [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*c. [[16,800 BBY]]
**The [[Siege of Belasco]] occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[16,700 BBY]]
**The First Alsakan Conflict ends as the Bureau of Ships and Services forces a peace—the Bureau threatens to withhold access to the hyperspace beacons.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[16,200 BBY]]
**The [[Second Alsakan Conflict]] begins.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[16,100 BBY]]
**The [[Second Siege of Porus Vida]] occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[16,000 BBY]]
**The Second Alsakan Conflict's [[Gizer Campaign]] occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[15,600 BBY]]
**The [[Core Campaigns]], part of the Second Alsakan Conflict, take place.<ref name="Warfare" />
*[[15,500 BBY]]
**The [[Duinuogwuin Contention]]: Republic scouts encounter the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]], or Star Dragons, near [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] and incur the leviathans' wrath. The Star Dragons attack Coruscant, sparking mass panic,<ref name="Warfare" /> but [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]] contacts the attackers and, upon discovering they are sentient, negotaties a peace with the philosopher [[Borz'Mat'oh]].<ref name="Coruscant and Core">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
**Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh collaborate to found the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].<ref name="Coruscant and Core" />
*[[15,480 BBY]]
**The [[Strontium Raid]] on [[Abhean/Legends|Abhean]] occurs.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[15,400 BBY]]
**The Second Alsakan Conflict comes to an end.<ref name="Warfare" />
*c. [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]
**The [[Anomid/Legends|Anomids]] of [[Yablari/Legends|Yablari]] join the Republic.<ref name="Ultimate Alien">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref>
**The [[Hutt Cataclysms]] come to an end; by this time, the Hutt homeworld of [[Varl/Legends|Varl]] and the other colony worlds are lifeless wastes, forcing the Hutts to relocate to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Evocar]].<ref name="Atlas" />
**The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] heeds calls for the reestablishment of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].<ref name="Warfare" />
**The [[Aquala/Legends|Aquala]] and [[Quara/Legends|Quara]] species fight a [[Aqualish Civil War|civil war]], but unite when an offworld exploratory vessel lands on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. The united [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] species kill the explorers and take their ship, learning to reproduce it.<ref name="Essential Alien">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
**The [[Kymoodon Era]] begins as the Indecta Era ends.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
*<!-- 2012-04-03 -->''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''
